title: The Reluctant Brother
description: Marsh arrives at Clubs' Shop, Kelsier's older brother and a rebel leader in his own right. He grudgingly joins the crew's plan.

title: The Warehouse Rally
description: Marsh attends the secret warehouse rally with the crew, watching his brother Kelsier preach revolution to the gathered skaa workers.

title: Ministry Infiltrator
description: Marsh meets Kelsier at Mount Tyrian, several miles outside Luthadel, to discuss the rebellion plan away from Ministry ears before beginning his dangerous infiltration of the Steel Ministry.

title: Deeper Undercover
description: Marsh delves deeper into the Ministry hierarchy at Kredik Shaw, learning the dark secrets of Hemalurgy while risking discovery by the Inquisitors.

title: Vanishing
description: Marsh goes silent, his communications ceasing as he disappears into the deepest levels of the Canton of Inquisition. The crew fears the worst.

title: The Inquisitor
description: Marsh appears during the final assault on Kredik Shaw, still alive but transformed—iron spikes driven through his eyes. He fights for the crew despite his transformation.

title: Eastern Wanderer
description: Marsh wanders the Eastern Dominance as a lone Inquisitor, seeking to understand his transformation while helping Sazed investigate distant villages.

title: The Conventical Guide
description: Marsh leads Sazed to the Conventical of Seran, an Inquisitor stronghold in the remote north, to find the records Sazed seeks.

title: Abandonment
description: Marsh abruptly abandons Sazed at the Conventical and vanishes into the wilderness, driven by forces he increasingly cannot resist. Ruin's influence grows.

title: Ruin's Puppet
description: Marsh appears at Kredik Shaw under Ruin's full control, fighting Sazed in the corridors while Vin descends to the Well of Ascension below.

title: Guarding the Well
description: Marsh guards the entrance to the Well, a puppet of Ruin, fighting to prevent anyone from reaching Vin—or helping her make the right choice.

title: Creating Inquisitors
description: Under Ruin's control, Marsh performs dark Hemalurgic rituals in Tathingdwen, creating new Inquisitors from captured Feruchemists and Allomancers.

title: Leading Koloss
description: Marsh commands a growing army of koloss on behalf of Ruin, moving through the Eastern Dominance and gathering forces for the final battle.

title: Near Tyrian
description: Marsh operates near Mount Tyrian, creating Hemalurgic spikes from captured prisoners and building Ruin's army of Inquisitors in the shadow of the ashmount.

title: The Spiking of Penrod
description: Marsh infiltrates Luthadel to spike King Penrod, granting Ruin a direct conduit into the governance of the capital.

title: Converging on Fadrex
description: Marsh leads his Inquisitors toward Fadrex City, converging on the siege as Ruin seeks to recover the atium cache hidden within.

title: Pursuing Vin
description: Marsh leads the Inquisitor pack chasing Vin eastward as she flees from Fadrex toward Luthadel, drawing Ruin's servants away from the cache.

title: The Battle of Hathsin
description: Marsh arrives at the Pits leading Ruin's forces. In a moment of recovered will, he tears Vin's earring free—an act of defiance that changes everything.

title: Killing Elend
description: Marsh, driven by Ruin, kills Emperor Elend during the Battle of Hathsin. The act fulfills Ruin's plan but costs Marsh another piece of his soul.

title: Freedom at Last
description: With Ruin destroyed, Marsh is finally freed from the god's control. He stands alone in the remade world, an Inquisitor who survived the end of everything.
